name: How long until I get paid benefits after work injury?

mainEntity.name: How long until I get paid benefits after work injury?

acceptedAnswer.text: Weeks after approval; report fast to speed up.[4]
acceptedAnswer.description: Varies: Medical immediate via insurer; temporary wages after approval, often weeks.[1][4] Delays if disputed.[2] Key factors: Prompt reporting speeds process; Form 122 in 7-21 days.[2] Practical guidance: Track claim status, apply for state aid if needed, push with lawyer. Most pay within 30-60 days.

description: Weeks after approval; report fast to speed up.[4]
